retention.description: Values are held only for your anonymous session and are deleted when you delete your session or it expires. Raw uploaded documents, full SSNs, and full government-ID numbers are never stored.

features.name: employee_name
features.purpose: Match income to the household member.

features.name: pay_period_start
features.purpose: Check the document is recent enough.

features.name: pay_period_end
features.purpose: Check the document is recent enough.

features.name: gross_pay
features.purpose: Annualize income for the frozen income-limit comparison.

features.name: recipient_name
features.purpose: Match the benefit to the household member.

features.name: monthly_amount
features.purpose: Include benefit income in the comparison.

features.name: effective_date
features.purpose: Check the benefit letter is current.

features.name: account_holder
features.purpose: Match the account to the household member.

features.name: full_name
features.purpose: Confirm the identity document is present.

features.name: id_number_last4
features.purpose: Reference the ID without storing the full number.

features.name: expiration_date
features.purpose: Check the ID is not expired.
